title: Project Miner Admission And Approval Contract Disclosure Controls
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM workbench scan burden by wrapping only the existing /pm-review/import-intake Admission and approval contract panel in a browser-native, default-open disclosure control while preserving its placement inside Approval Prep Detail before Local Review Checklist, aria label, Admission Shape card, Approval Contract card, labels, values, order, fallback text, export behavior, no-storage behavior, no-authority wording, read seams, and no-authority boundary.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Usability Implementer
implemented_scope: Convert the existing Admission and approval contract panel wrapper to a native default-open disclosure control.
Preserve the Admission and approval contract aria label.
Keep the panel inside Approval Prep Detail before Local Review Checklist.
Preserve the existing Admission Shape card, Approval Contract card, labels, values, order, fallback text, export behavior, no-storage behavior, and no-authority wording.

Preserve existing storage behavior, read seams, route links, quick-jump rail, output actions, output statuses, helper disclosures, detail disclosures, handoff-guide disclosure, workflow-map disclosure, open-items disclosure, snapshot disclosure, operating-queue disclosure, import-exception-register disclosure, workflow-gates disclosure, and exception/decision detail disclosure.

Add focused smoke coverage proving default-open state, collapse/reopen behavior, hidden/visible admission and approval contract child cards, fixture values still visible when open, absence of admission/approval-contract disclosure-state localStorage keys, and continued PM Lane 083 authority guard posture.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
sidecar_result: A read-only sidecar from PM Lane 097 recommended PM Lane 098 as Project Miner Admission And Approval Contract Disclosure Controls. The recommendation was accepted as a browser-local AI/orchestration approval-prep ergonomics slice. A separate read-only sidecar completed a PM Lane 099 scout and recommended Project Miner Local Review Checklist Disclosure Controls as the next non-overlapping lane, with no write ownership in this tranche.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page Admission and approval contract panel wrapper markup.
Modify focused operations-web smoke tests for default-open admission/approval contract disclosure controls and no persisted collapse state.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No local approval decision draft change.
No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
